name: 4"x3" AA Plastic LED Small Flameless Pillar Candle with Timer White - Threshold™: Safe Indoor/Outdoor Decor, 2 AA Battery Operated
description:
Amp up the look of your space with the beautiful lighting effect of the AA Plastic LED Flameless Pillar Candle with Timer from Threshold™. This white pillar candle is made with plastic and features a flameless design for elegant appeal. It comes with a timer to help you set the timing for lighting according to your need. Perfect for romantic date nights, casual dining or just lighting, this LED pillar candle requires two AA alkaline batteries.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
